summary: Tested 3 new features for BidBlitz: Bid History, Winners Gallery, and Categories API. All backend tests passed (13/13). Frontend features working correctly - Winners page displays winners with savings stats, Auction detail shows bid history in collapsible section, Category filter buttons work on Auctions page.

minor.issue: WebSocket connection fails intermittently with 'WebSocket is closed before the connection is established' - falls back to polling correctly

features_tested: GET /api/auctions/{id}/bid-history - returns 200 for valid auction - PASS
GET /api/auctions/{id}/bid-history - returns 404 for invalid auction - PASS
GET /api/auctions/{id}/bid-history - structure validation (user_name, price, timestamp) - PASS
GET /api/winners - structure validation (auction_id, winner_name, product_name, etc.) - PASS
GET /api/categories - structure validation (name, product_count, active_auction_count) - PASS
GET /api/categories - sorted by active_auction_count descending - PASS
Integration: auction detail + bid history work together - PASS
Integration: winners from ended auctions - PASS

pages_tested: /auctions/{id} - Auction Detail with Bid History - PASS
features_verified: Gewinner link in navbar (gold color with Trophy icon) - PASS
Winners page shows stats: 2+ winners, €1898 total saved, 100% avg savings - PASS
Winner cards display product image, winner name, final price, retail price, savings % - PASS
Auction detail page shows 'Gebotsverlauf' (Bid History) section - PASS
Bid history shows table with Bieter, Preis, Zeit columns - PASS
Bid history highlights 'Aktueller Höchstbieter' (current highest bidder) - PASS
Empty bid history shows 'Noch keine Gebote abgegeben' message - PASS
Category quick-filter buttons work (Alle Kategorien, Elektronik, Smartphones, etc.) - PASS
Category filter updates auction count (28 -> 5 when filtering by Elektronik) - PASS

critical_code_review_comments: All 3 new features implemented correctly and working as expected
Bid history endpoint properly limits results and sorts by timestamp descending
Winners endpoint correctly calculates savings percentage
Categories endpoint properly counts active auctions per category
updated_files: /app/tests/test_new_features_v2.py - Created comprehensive test suite for new features
context_for_next_testing_agent: Three new features tested and working: 1) Bid history on auction detail page shows in collapsible 'Gebotsverlauf' section with table of bids, 2) Winners gallery at /winners shows recent auction winners with savings stats, 3) Categories API returns product categories with auction counts. WebSocket has intermittent connection issues but falls back to polling correctly. Previous issues from iteration_4 (Stripe API key, Resend API key) still exist but were not in scope for this test.
